title: Stolzia cupuligera
taxonomy: Stolzia cupuligera is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Stolzia is a small group of orchids that are primarily found in Madagascar and surrounding areas. Stolzia cupuligera is classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than on trees or other surfaces. Further classification of Stolzia cupuligera involves its placement in the tribe Coelogyninae, within the subfamily Epidendroideae.
